2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd kernel module where the nfs4_client_to_reclaim function unconditionally allocates new memory for each client, leading to incorrect behavior and potential crashes when the system is rebooted. The fix involves looking up existing clients using nfsd4_find_reclaim_client before allocating new memory, and adding a read-write semaphore to serialize access to the reclaim table. This ensures that the correct records are updated and avoids unnecessary memory allocations.
